resolved.title: Restore blind-overwrites every learned store except round history — offline-accumulated CNS/club-stats/practice/family data is silently lost
Unauthenticated SSRF via user-supplied imageUrl in /api/pose-analysis
swing-question.ts: primary Gemini vision call has no request timeout — a hung Gemini stalls the lambda to Vercel's maxDuration and defeats the OpenAI fallback
lie-analysis.ts: Gemini vision call has no request timeout — a hung Gemini blocks the lambda when a client requests a non-openai provider
CageTargetingCard placement modal renders existingBall/existingTarget/draft into SVG without the finiteness guard used by its sibling display overlay
CaddieAvatar transition effect has no unmount cleanup — leaked timer + setState after unmount
Rules-of-Hooks violation in swing detail: two hooks declared after conditional early returns → red-screen crash on cold/deep-link open
Message IDOR: read/send any user's messages
resolved.fix: shared app-key gate (x-app-key/keysMatch) + optional participant allow-list; client sends key
resolved.followup: real per-user auth (bind to backup passphrase / email-verified tokens)

resolved.title: Backup brute-force: 4-char passphrase + fail-open rate limit
resolved.fix: in-memory per-email (spoof-proof, migration-independent) + per-IP throttle alongside DB per-IP; passphrase length unchanged to avoid lockout
resolved.followup: apply migration 0005 for cross-instance DB limiter
